blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Automatic hold expiry and seat release', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete checks or confirmations regarding this functionality. While the linked use case describes the expected behavior of automatic seat release upon checkout failure or expiry, there is no evidence from prior steps that confirms this feature is operational or tested. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
